result.output:
Explanation: Jerry Mao, an Australian competitive programmer, won bronze, silver, gold, and silver medals in four consecutive IOIs (2015–2018) [89819]. He was part of the MIT team that won the ICPC World Finals. The 45th ICPC World Finals, where MIT won with Jerry Mao as a team member, was held in Dhaka, Bangladesh [70954][72318]. Therefore, the year associated with the competition title is 2021 (the "ICPC 2021 World Finals Dhaka" held in 2022 due to delays), and the host university was in Dhaka, Bangladesh.
Exact Answer: 2021, Dhaka (hosted in 2022 at Dhaka, Bangladesh)
Confidence: 100%
